stories.title: Clark rides roller coaster to 2nd U.S. Open crown
U.S. Open 2026: Wyndham Clark wins it all and more...
stories.summary: Wyndham Clark is your 2026 U.S. Open champion. Here's a look back at how he pulled it off in a dramatic Sunday finish.

stories.title: Sources: B. Tkachuk to Panthers, joins brother
stories.summary: Brady Tkachuk, captain of the Ottawa Senators, was dealt to the Florida Panthers, sources said Sunday, for a host of draft picks, allowing the wing to join his brother, Matthew, on a two-time Stanley Cup champion team that missed the playoffs this year.

stories.title: UNC cools off Arkansas to force decisive Game 3
stories.summary: Ryan Lynch and Caden Glauber cooled off Oklahoma's bats, Owen Hull and Cooper Nicholson homered, and North Carolina beat Oklahoma 6-2 in Game 2 of the Men's College World Series finals Sunday.

stories.title: Serena to play in Wimbledon singles as wild card
stories.summary: Serena Williams will compete in the Wimbledon ladies' singles as a wild card, the Grand Slam tournament announced Sunday.
